# Additional Instructions

All coding guidelines and instructions for this repository are maintained in the `.ai/` directory at the root of the workspace.

## Quick Links
- [Repository Overview](../../.ai/repository.md)
- [Nx Rules](../../.ai/nx-rules.md)
- [System Design Rules](../../.ai/system-design-rules.md)
- [Module Design Rules](../../.ai/module-design-rule.md)
- [Testing Rules](../../.ai/testing-rules.md)

## Structure
This folderstructure exists to support GitHub Copilot's native file discovery. All actual content is maintained in `.ai/` to serve as a single source of truth for:
- VS Code Copilot
- GitHub Copilot
- CLI tools
- CI/CD pipelines
- Documentation generators

Refer to files in `.ai/` for the authoritative guidelines.
